title: Passive Aggressive
body:
## About
Ever stumbled across some wool and meat laying on the ground and felt sorry for the poor sheep murdered in cold blood? Perhaps the items were some raw chicken and feathers?

"Passive Aggressive" is a simple mod that aims to prevent passive mobs from hunting each other such as in this case, wolves attacking sheep or ocelots being hostile to chickens. 
With this mod installed, predators will no longer be aggressive towards their usual prey.

## Commands
**A.** Switch between passive/aggressive behaviors: **`/trigger predator_toggle`**\
**B.** View the current predatory behavior: **`/trigger predator_status`**

## Info
A full list of affected mobs can be found down below (see also [Minecraft infighting](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Monster_infighting))

<details>
<summary>Affected Mobs (Predators → Prey)</summary>

- Wolves → Sheep, Foxes and Baby Turtles
- Polar Bears → Foxes
- Cats → Rabbits and Baby Turtles
- Axolotls → All types of Squid or Fish
- Foxes → Chickens, Rabbits, Baby Turtles and all types of Fish
- Ocelots → Chickens and Baby Turtles

</details>

DO NOT FORGET TO DOWNLOAD [PASSIVE AGGRESSIVE SOUND](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/passive-aggressive-sound) IF USING THE DATAPACK.

---

*Made using [Visual Studio Code](https://code.visualstudio.com)*
